title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India Holdings Services in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India Holdings Services:
Kia India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
